name: Jasper
description: AI content platform for marketing teams to create on-brand copy, blog posts, and campaigns at scale.
keyFeature: Brand voice training and marketing-specific templates

name: Copy.ai
description: AI-powered copywriting tool for generating marketing copy, product descriptions, and social media content.
keyFeature: 90+ copywriting templates and workflows for GTM teams

name: Writesonic
description: AI writing platform for blog posts, ads, product descriptions, and SEO content with built-in fact-checking.
keyFeature: Built-in SEO optimization and real-time factual writing with citations

name: Grammarly
description: AI writing assistant for grammar, tone, clarity, and style improvements across all platforms.
targetUser: Everyone who writes in English professionally
keyFeature: Works everywhere via browser extension with tone and clarity suggestions

name: Rytr
description: Budget-friendly AI writing assistant for generating content in 30+ languages with multiple tones.
keyFeature: Extremely affordable with multi-language support and plagiarism checker

name: QuillBot
description: AI paraphrasing and grammar tool for rewriting, summarizing, and improving existing text.
keyFeature: Multiple paraphrasing modes (fluency, formal, creative, etc.)

name: Notion AI
description: AI assistant built into Notion workspace for writing, summarizing, brainstorming, and translating content.
keyFeature: Deeply integrated into your existing Notion workspace and databases

name: Anyword
description: AI copywriting platform with predictive performance scores to optimize marketing content before publishing.
keyFeature: Predictive performance scoring that rates copy effectiveness before you publish

name: ChatGPT
description: OpenAI's conversational AI for writing, analysis, coding, research, and general-purpose task assistance.
keyFeature: Broadest general capability with GPT-4o, plugins, DALL-E image gen, and code interpreter

name: Claude
description: Anthropic's AI assistant excelling at long-form writing, structured reasoning, and careful analysis.
keyFeature: 200K context window and strong structured reasoning for complex business tasks

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-powered search engine that provides sourced answers with citations from the web in real time.
keyFeature: Real-time web search with inline source citations for every answer

name: Character.AI
description: Platform for creating and chatting with customizable AI characters for entertainment, roleplay, and learning.
keyFeature: User-created AI characters with distinct personalities for interactive conversations

name: CustomGPT
description: Build custom ChatGPT-powered chatbots trained on your own business data for customer support and sales.
keyFeature: No-code chatbot builder trained on your documents, website, and knowledge base

name: Midjourney
description: AI image generation tool producing highly aesthetic and detailed artwork from text prompts.
keyFeature: Industry-leading aesthetic quality and artistic style control

name: DALL-E 3
description: OpenAI's text-to-image model integrated into ChatGPT for generating images from detailed text descriptions.
pricing: Included with ChatGPT Plus ($20/mo) — API pay-per-use
keyFeature: Best text rendering in images and tight integration with ChatGPT for iterative editing

name: Leonardo AI
description: AI image generation platform for creating production-quality game assets, concept art, and design assets.
targetUser: Game developers, concept artists, content creators
keyFeature: Fine-tuned models for game assets and consistent character generation

name: Canva
description: All-in-one design platform with AI-powered tools for creating social media graphics, presentations, and marketing materials.
pricing: Free tier — $15/mo Pro — $10/mo per person Teams
targetUser: Non-designers, small businesses, social media managers
keyFeature: Magic Studio AI suite (text-to-image, background remover, Magic Eraser) inside a full design platform

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generator with best-in-class text rendering capabilities for logos, posters, and typography-heavy designs.
keyFeature: Superior text-in-image rendering for logos and typographic designs

name: Playground AI
description: Free AI image creation platform with mixed image editing combining AI generation and traditional design tools.
keyFeature: Generous free tier with canvas-based editing that blends AI generation and manual design

name: Adobe Firefly
description: Adobe's generative AI for commercially safe image creation, integrated across Photoshop and Creative Cloud.
pricing: Free tier (25 credits/mo) — Included with Creative Cloud ($55/mo)
targetUser: Professional designers, photographers, Creative Cloud users
keyFeature: Trained on licensed content for commercial safety, integrated into Photoshop and Illustrator

name: Synthesia
description: AI video generation platform that creates professional videos with realistic AI avatars from text scripts.
keyFeature: 150+ AI avatars speaking 130+ languages for scalable video production without cameras

name: Runway
description: AI-powered creative suite for video generation, editing, and visual effects using Gen-4 models.

name: HeyGen
description: AI video platform for creating talking avatar videos, video translation, and personalized video at scale.
keyFeature: Instant video translation with lip-sync in 40+ languages

name: Descript
description: AI-powered video and podcast editor that lets you edit media by editing text transcripts.
keyFeature: Edit video/audio by editing text — delete words from transcript to remove from media

name: Pictory
description: AI tool that converts long-form text content (blogs, scripts) into short branded videos automatically.

name: ElevenLabs
description: AI voice synthesis platform for generating ultra-realistic voiceovers, voice cloning, and text-to-speech.

name: Murf AI

name: Opus Clip

name: Suno
description: AI music generation platform that creates full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from text prompts.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code with built-in AI pair programming, code generation, and codebase understanding.

name: GitHub Copilot

name: Lovable
description: AI full-stack app builder that turns natural language descriptions into deployed web applications.
pricing: Free tier (5 daily credits) — $25/mo Pro — $50/mo Business
keyFeature: Generates complete full-stack apps with frontend, backend, and database from a prompt

name: Bolt.new
description: AI-powered web development environment that builds, runs, and deploys full-stack apps directly in the browser.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: AI tool that generates production-ready React/Next.js UI components from text descriptions and screenshots.

name: Replit
description: Cloud IDE with AI coding assistant that helps build, deploy, and host applications entirely in the browser.

name: Tabnine
description: AI code assistant focused on privacy with on-premise deployment options and personalized code completions.
keyFeature: Self-hosted option that keeps code private — never trains on your codebase

name: Zapier
description: No-code automation platform connecting 7,000+ apps with AI-powered workflow building and natural language triggers.

name: Make (Integromat)
description: Visual automation platform for building complex multi-step workflows with branching, error handling, and AI integrations.

name: n8n
description: Open-source workflow automation tool with native AI/LLM nodes for building AI agent workflows.

name: Bardeen
description: AI-powered browser automation that scrapes data, automates repetitive tasks, and connects web apps without code.

name: Lindy.ai
description: AI agent platform for building custom AI employees that handle email, scheduling, CRM updates, and more.

name: Taskade
